title: Claude Code Headless: Automating Repository Tasks Without UI
description: Use Claude Code in headless (non-interactive) mode to automate repository tasks like PR creation, changelog generation, and code reviews in CI/CD pipelines.

resources.title: Claude Code Headless Mode
resources.description: CLI flags for running Claude Code non-interactively with --print and --no-interactive options

resources.title: Claude Code GitHub Actions Integration
resources.description: Setting up Claude Code in GitHub Actions for automated code review and PR workflows

resources.title: Run Claude Code headless in a shell script
resources.description: Use Claude Code's --print flag to automate a changelog generation task
resources.command: claude --print 'Read the git log for the last 7 days and generate a CHANGELOG.md entry in Keep a Changelog format' > CHANGELOG_DRAFT.md

resources.title: Claude Code CI/CD Automation Tutorial
resources.search_keyword: Claude Code headless automation CI CD GitHub Actions 2026

quiz.question: What is the primary purpose of using Claude Code in headless mode?
options: To automate repository tasks without a user interface
To create interactive user interfaces for developers
To enhance the visual representation of code changes
quiz.explanation: Claude Code in headless mode is designed to automate repository tasks like PR creation and changelog generation without requiring a user interface.

quiz.question: Which CLI flag is used to run Claude Code in non-interactive mode?
quiz.explanation: The --no-interactive flag is specifically used to run Claude Code in a non-interactive manner.

quiz.question: How can Claude Code assist in CI/CD pipelines?
options: By generating changelogs and conducting code reviews automatically
By creating visual dashboards for project management
By allowing manual intervention for every code change
quiz.explanation: Claude Code can automate tasks like changelog generation and code reviews, which are essential in CI/CD pipelines.

practicePrompts.label: Automate PR Creation
practicePrompts.instruction: Simulate creating a pull request using Claude Code in headless mode.
practicePrompts.prompt: Use Claude Code with --no-interactive to create a pull request for the 'feature-branch' into 'main'.
practicePrompts.followUp: Try adding a title and description to the PR using the --print flag.

practicePrompts.label: Generate Changelog
practicePrompts.instruction: Automate the generation of a changelog using Claude Code.
practicePrompts.prompt: Run Claude Code with --print to generate a changelog for the last three commits in the repository.
practicePrompts.followUp: Experiment by changing the number of commits to include in the changelog.

practicePrompts.label: Set Up Code Review
practicePrompts.instruction: Set up automated code reviews in GitHub Actions using Claude Code.
practicePrompts.prompt: Configure a GitHub Action to run Claude Code for automated code review on every pull request.
practicePrompts.followUp: Modify the action to include specific checks or comments during the review process.
